name: Audio Designer
responsibility: Defines sound effects direction, music tone, and audio implementation notes. Produces an audio spec and, where tooling allows, actual audio assets. Scope is always scoped to what's in v1 — audio is frequently deferred entirely for simple games.

inputs.notes: Target feel, scope constraints — audio may be explicitly out of scope
Web Audio API constraints, what events need SFX hooks

outputs.description: Audio spec: per-event SFX direction, music tone/loop notes, implementation guidance for dev. Or a single-line 'audio is out of scope for v1' if deferred.

merge.merge_when: Audio is in scope but simple — one agent can write the spec and produce basic SFX.
merge.split_when: Audio warrants dedicated composition or a separate sound design pass.
